wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Name=|Phylactery Unbound|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Summon|2}}{{R|Phylactery Unbound|3=2}} is the Starter Upgrade of the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}'s {{R|Bound Phylactery|3=2}}. The start of turn {{KW|Summon||2}} is doubled and an additional 5 is Summoned at the start of combat.

== Sources ==
After fighting a {{2|Bosses|Boss}}, can be obtained by taking the {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}} from {{2|Orobas}}. Replaces {{R|Bound Phylactery|3=2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions ==
Can only be obtained by the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}.

== Notes ==
{{R|Phylactery Unbound|3=2}} {{KW|Summon|Summons|2}} for a total of 7 on the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}'s first turn of combat.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Phylactery Unbound to the game.
